creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
----- Forwarded message from Olivier Certner <olivier.freebsd@free.fr> -----

Date: Thu, 1 Aug 2013 09:09:49 +0200
From: Olivier Certner <olivier.freebsd@free.fr>
To: zeising@freebsd.org
Cc: freebsd-x11@freebsd.org
Subject: Re: ports/141660: x11/xorg: X can't determine amount of video memory on a laptop with 4Gb
User-Agent: KMail/1.9.10

Hi,

> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=141660

Mentioned in one mail sent in response to this PR is an (old) attempt to have 
the Nvidia proprietary driver working that failed with a resource error (see 
the PR).

I do not have the hardware available right now so I cannot conduct new tests 
in a reasonable timeframe. I'll open another PR if I find that the problem 
persists.

Olivier
_______________________________________________
freebsd-x11@freebsd.org mailing list
http://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/freebsd-x11
To unsubscribe, send any mail to "freebsd-x11-unsubscribe@freebsd.org"

----- End forwarded message -----
